flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gateway Technical College are 10% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($40.3k vs $44.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gateway Technical College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (45.5% → 35.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gateway Technical College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.0k → $12.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gateway Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).
